name: vault-sync
description: Cross-platform vault sync infrastructure for Codex: rclone push, GitHub fetch-notify, presync, snapshot. macOS launchd + Linux systemd.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-platform vault sync infrastructure for Codex agents
interface.longDescription: 5 skills (vault-sync-install, vault-sync-status, vault-sync-uninstall, vault-presync, vault-snapshot) for managing rclone push, git fetch-notify, presync lint/rebase, and snapshot promotion across macOS and Linux hosts.
defaultPrompt: Install vault-sync on this host with leaf role.
Run presync lint gate and rebase before pushing.
